# registry_modules (Data Source)

Lists registry modules with optional namespace and search filtering.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "registry_modules" "all" {}

data "registry_modules" "by_namespace" {
  namespace = "my-org"
}

data "registry_modules" "search" {
  search = "vpc"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `namespace` (String) Filter by namespace.
- `search` (String) Search string.

### Read-Only

- `modules` (Attributes List) List of modules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--modules))

<a id="nestedatt--modules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `modules`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `id` (String) UUID.
- `name` (String) Module name.
- `namespace` (String) Module namespace.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization UUID.
- `source` (String) Source repository URL.
- `system` (String) Provider system.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
